description: Calculate a composite 'ImpactScore' for every hotel in the 'demodb' database. Add a property named 'ImpactScore' of type DOUBLE to the 'Hotels' class and update all records using the formula: ImpactScore = (Stars * 10) + (Number of incoming HasStayed edges * 2), treating NULL stars as 0. Export all hotels with an ImpactScore greater than 60 to /home/ga/top_tier_hotels.json, ensuring the JSON output contains the Name, Stars, and ImpactScore for each hotel.
